channel.title: Special Characters Feed
channel.description: Articles with unicode, entities, and emoji

item.title: Tech Giants Report Q4 Results & Future Plans
item.description: Results show growth across all sectors. Revenue was $5.2B & profit margins improved by 15%. The café division also performed well.

item.title: Nouvelles technologies en France et au Japon
item.description: Les entreprises françaises collaborent avec des partenaires japonais. 日本の技術 (Japanese tech) leads innovation. Prüfung der Ergebnisse zeigt positive Trends.

item.title: Market Update: Stocks Rise Amid Optimism
item.description: The S&P 500 rose 2.3% today. Investors are optimistic about Q1 earnings. The “bull market” continues with strong momentum — analysts predict further gains through 2026.
